scripts.build: npm run build --prefix generate && npm run build --prefix cursor && pnpm --dir openclaw exec tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck
scripts.test: npm test --prefix generate && npm test --prefix cursor && pnpm --dir openclaw test && python3 -m pytest tests/hermes/ -v
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir openclaw exec tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck && (cd generate && npx tsc --noEmit) && (cd cursor && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit) && (cd cursor && npx tsc -p tsconfig.cli.json --noEmit)
scripts.pack:check: (cd generate && npm pack --dry-run --json >/tmp/hent-generate-pack.json) && (cd cursor && npm pack --dry-run --json >/tmp/hent-cursor-pack.json) && (cd openclaw && npm pack --dry-run --json >/tmp/hent-openclaw-pack.json)
